yaml.title: The Classroom Arithmetic
yaml.subtitle: Alberta's education system is building schools for yesterday's growth while a demographic pulse rolls toward secondary school
yaml.description: A fact-check of UCP education claims reveals three true numbers doing political work. Beneath them: a wave of children moving through Alberta's schools that no three-year hiring commitment can outrun.

language.appendix-attribution-cite-as: For attribution, please cite this work as:

metadata.title: The Classroom Arithmetic
metadata.subtitle: Alberta's education system is building schools for yesterday's growth while a demographic pulse rolls toward secondary school
metadata.description: A fact-check of UCP education claims reveals three true numbers doing political work. Beneath them: a wave of children moving through Alberta's schools that no three-year hiring commitment can outrun.
